summary: rebound authority HEAD is persisted before the remaining autonomous suffix starts, preserving the architecture boundary across interruption and resume.
judgment_delta: runSafeActionPlan rebinds current_head_sha and regenerates the remaining suffix before its next iteration.
guarded-run progress persists the rebound SHA and implement journal entry before verify invokes.
resume authority and completed mutation checkpoints remain bound to the persisted output HEAD.
residual_risks: A dedicated crash and recreate-session integration test between implement persistence and verify would further lock the boundary; current unit and integration assertions cover the underlying persistence and resume rules.
